kwargs.content: Use the generate_process_rule_from_bpmn tool to generate a process rule from the following BPMN file: bpmn/J09C_extension_mail.bpmn and store it in the database as J09C

content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Start process.
2. Copy decision table into table J09C_temp where the tour starts with J09C.
3. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
4. Classify meter reading type. Apply rules: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU". SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU". SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU". SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU". SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU".
5. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
6. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
7. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
8. Check if sales customer data is NOT empty.
    *   If True: Use sales customer data table entries.
    *   Else: Use net data customer table entries.
9. Identify households with mandatory meter reading. Apply rules: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
10. Export these households to CSV. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
11. Send them to the internal team. Email address: mandatory.reading@provider.com, file_path: <file path for J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>.
12. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report. Apply rules: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
13. Export these trustworthy households to CSV. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
14. Send bulk email to all of the DIRECT_MAIL households. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
15. Export the final data except the MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
16. Send email with the CSV file to EVU. Email address: meter.readings@evu.com, file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
17. Delete temporary table.
18. End process."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Start process.
2. Copy decision table into table J09C_temp where the tour starts with J09C.
3. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
4. Classify meter reading type. Apply rules: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU". SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU". SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU". SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU". SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU".
5. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
6. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
7. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
8. Check if sales customer data is NOT empty.
    *   If True: Use sales customer data table entries.
    *   Else: Use net data customer table entries.
9. Identify households with mandatory meter reading. Apply rules: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
10. Export these households to CSV. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
11. Send them to the internal team. Email address: mandatory.reading@provider.com, file_path: <file path for J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>.
12. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report. Apply rules: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
13. Export these trustworthy households to CSV. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
14. Send bulk email to all of the DIRECT_MAIL households. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
15. Export the final data except the MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
16. Send email with the CSV file to EVU. Email address: meter.readings@evu.com, file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
17. Delete temporary table.
18. End process.

kwargs.content:
Perfect! I've successfully generated a process rule from the BPMN file `bpmn/J09C_extension_mail.bpmn` and stored it in the database with ID **J09C**.

The generated process rule contains 18 steps covering:
- Starting the process and copying decision tables
- Classifying meter reading types (KSA, EVU, MANDATORY_READING, DIRECT_MAIL)
- Joining multiple data tables (EABLG, SALES_MASTER, NET_MASTER)
- Comparing customer data and identifying households with mandatory readings or trustworthy self-reporting
- Exporting three different CSV files (J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv, J09C_DIRECT_MAIL.csv, J09C.csv)
- Sending emails to internal team and EVU
- Cleaning up temporary tables

The process rule has been automatically stored in the database and is ready for execution whenever needed.
